---
title: "AI Cyber Security Design"
description: "Animated architecture diagrams across AI infrastructure, AI security, data platforms, and how modern AI systems really work — end to end."
page-layout: full
toc: false
lightbox: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .acsd-intro { max-width: 60rem; margin: 0 auto 1.75rem; }
        .acsd-collage {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
          gap: 14px;
          margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
        }
        .acsd-tile {
          position: relative;
          display: block;
          border-radius: 16px;
          overflow: hidden;
          background: #fff;
          border: 1px solid rgba(76,74,152,0.16);
          box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(30,30,60,0.06);
          transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
        }
        .acsd-tile:hover {
          transform: translateY(-4px);
          box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(76,74,152,0.22);
        }
        .acsd-tile img {
          width: 100%;
          aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
          object-fit: cover;
          display: block;
        }
        .acsd-cap {
          position: absolute;
          left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
          padding: 1.4rem .95rem .7rem;
          background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(20,18,40,0.78));
          color: #fff;
          opacity: 0;
          transition: opacity .18s ease;
        }
        .acsd-tile:hover .acsd-cap { opacity: 1; }
        .acsd-cap b { font-size: .98rem; font-weight: 700; display: block; }
        .acsd-cap span { font-size: .8rem; opacity: .9; }
        @media (max-width: 820px) {
          .acsd-collage { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 12px; }
        }

        /* full-screen lightbox */
        .acsd-lb {
          position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 99999;
          display: none;
          align-items: center; justify-content: center;
          background: rgba(8, 7, 18, 0.94);
          backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
          padding: 2.5rem;
        }
        .acsd-lb.open { display: flex; }
        .acsd-lb img {
          max-width: 96vw; max-height: 90vh;
          object-fit: contain;
          border-radius: 12px;
          box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
        }
        .acsd-lb-close {
          position: fixed; top: 18px; right: 22px;
          width: 46px; height: 46px;
          border: none; border-radius: 50%;
          background: rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
          color: #fff; font-size: 1.6rem; line-height: 1;
          cursor: pointer;
          display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
          transition: background .15s ease, transform .15s ease;
        }
        .acsd-lb-close:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); transform: scale(1.08); }
        .acsd-lb-cap {
          position: fixed; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 16px;
          text-align: center; color: #fff; font-size: .95rem;
          opacity: .9; pointer-events: none;
          padding: 0 1rem;
        }
        body.acsd-lb-on { overflow: hidden; }
      </style>
---

::: {.acsd-intro}
A collection of **animated architecture diagrams** — each a single, detailed picture of how a real AI or security system fits together, from raw input to final output. Tap any tile to open it full-size.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="acsd-collage">

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/01-agentic-rag-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/01-agentic-rag-platform.gif" alt="Agentic RAG Platform" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Agentic RAG Platform</b><span>Plan, search, call tools, ground the answer.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/02-llm-finetuning-pipeline.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/02-llm-finetuning-pipeline.gif" alt="LLM Fine-tuning Pipeline" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>LLM Fine-tuning Pipeline</b><span>Data → LoRA/QLoRA → eval → registry → ship.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/03-ai-evals-observability.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/03-ai-evals-observability.gif" alt="AI Evals & Observability" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Evals & Observability</b><span>Log, score, trace the why, catch drift early.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/04-multi-agent-orchestration.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/04-multi-agent-orchestration.gif" alt="Multi-Agent Orchestration" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Multi-Agent Orchestration</b><span>A supervisor routes specialist agents over a bus.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/05-voice-ai-pipeline.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/05-voice-ai-pipeline.gif" alt="Voice AI Pipeline" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Voice AI Pipeline</b><span>Speech → LLM → speech, streamed in under a second.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/06-securing-llm-stack.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/06-securing-llm-stack.gif" alt="Securing the LLM App Stack" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Securing the LLM App Stack</b><span>OWASP Top 10 for LLMs, mapped to every layer.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/07-ai-red-teaming-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/07-ai-red-teaming-platform.gif" alt="AI Red Teaming Platform" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Red Teaming Platform</b><span>Adversarial prompts at scale → back to guardrails.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/08-ai-soc-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/08-ai-soc-platform.gif" alt="AI-Powered SOC" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI-Powered SOC</b><span>ML triage + an agent that maps to MITRE ATT&CK.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/09-shadow-ai-dlp.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/09-shadow-ai-dlp.gif" alt="Shadow AI / DLP" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Shadow AI / DLP</b><span>Discover AI tools, inspect data, redact secrets.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/10-zero-trust-ai-agents.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/10-zero-trust-ai-agents.gif" alt="Zero Trust for AI Agents" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Zero Trust for AI Agents</b><span>SPIFFE identity, OPA policy, Vault, least privilege.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/11-modern-data-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/11-modern-data-platform.gif" alt="Modern Data Platform for AI" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Modern Data Platform for AI</b><span>Ingest → lake → transform → govern → serve.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/12-realtime-ml-fraud.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/12-realtime-ml-fraud.gif" alt="Realtime ML / Fraud Detection" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Realtime ML / Fraud Detection</b><span>Stream → features → score in ms → approve/block.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/13-mlops-cicd.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/13-mlops-cicd.gif" alt="MLOps CI/CD for Models" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>MLOps CI/CD for Models</b><span>Push → eval gates → canary → promote or rollback.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/14-chatgpt-request-journey.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/14-chatgpt-request-journey.gif" alt="What Happens When You Ask ChatGPT" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>What Happens When You Ask ChatGPT</b><span>Edge → router → GPU prefill/decode → stream back.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/15-frontier-training-run.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/15-frontier-training-run.gif" alt="Inside a Frontier Training Run" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Inside a Frontier Training Run</b><span>Web data → pretrain → eval gates → post-train → release.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/16-llm-inference-serving.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/16-llm-inference-serving.gif" alt="LLM Inference & Serving" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>LLM Inference & Serving</b><span>How a token actually gets generated.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/17-ai-gateway-router.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/17-ai-gateway-router.gif" alt="AI Gateway / LLM Router" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Gateway / LLM Router</b><span>One front door for every model.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/18-embeddings-vector-search.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/18-embeddings-vector-search.gif" alt="Embeddings & Vector Search" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Embeddings & Vector Search</b><span>How AI finds the right context.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/19-mcp-tool-calling.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/19-mcp-tool-calling.gif" alt="MCP & Tool-Calling" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>MCP & Tool-Calling</b><span>How agents reach tools and data.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/20-prompt-injection-defense.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/20-prompt-injection-defense.gif" alt="Prompt Injection Defense" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Prompt Injection Defense</b><span>Stopping the #1 LLM attack.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/21-ai-supply-chain-security.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/21-ai-supply-chain-security.gif" alt="AI/ML Supply Chain Security" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI/ML Supply Chain Security</b><span>Trust what you didn't train.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/22-llm-data-privacy-pii.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/22-llm-data-privacy-pii.gif" alt="LLM Data Privacy & PII" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>LLM Data Privacy & PII</b><span>Keep secrets out of the model.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/23-confidential-ai.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/23-confidential-ai.gif" alt="Confidential AI" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Confidential AI</b><span>Inference nobody can peek into.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/24-ai-threat-intel.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/24-ai-threat-intel.gif" alt="AI-Powered Threat Intel" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI-Powered Threat Intel</b><span>From noise to named threats.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/25-streaming-data-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/25-streaming-data-platform.gif" alt="Streaming Data Platform" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Streaming Data Platform</b><span>Data in motion, not at rest.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/26-feature-store.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/26-feature-store.gif" alt="Feature Store" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Feature Store</b><span>One source of truth for features.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/27-recommendation-system.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/27-recommendation-system.gif" alt="Recommendation System" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Recommendation System</b><span>How the feed gets picked.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/28-how-attention-works.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/28-how-attention-works.gif" alt="How Attention Works" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>How Attention Works</b><span>The heart of the transformer.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/29-how-diffusion-works.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/29-how-diffusion-works.gif" alt="How Diffusion Works" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>How Diffusion Works</b><span>From noise to an image.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/30-rag-vs-finetune-vs-prompt.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/30-rag-vs-finetune-vs-prompt.gif" alt="RAG vs Fine-tune vs Prompt" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>RAG vs Fine-tune vs Prompt</b><span>Which one do you actually need.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/31-mixture-of-experts.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/31-mixture-of-experts.gif" alt="Mixture-of-Experts" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Mixture-of-Experts</b><span>Scale params, not compute.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/32-ai-agent-memory.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/32-ai-agent-memory.gif" alt="AI Agent Memory" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Agent Memory</b><span>How an agent remembers.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/33-model-compression.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/33-model-compression.gif" alt="Model Compression & Distillation" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Model Compression & Distillation</b><span>Big model into small & fast.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/34-gpu-supercluster.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/34-gpu-supercluster.gif" alt="GPU Supercluster Anatomy" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>GPU Supercluster Anatomy</b><span>Where models are trained.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/35-ai-governance-compliance.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/35-ai-governance-compliance.gif" alt="AI Governance & Compliance" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Governance & Compliance</b><span>Ship AI you can defend.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/36-deepfake-detection.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/36-deepfake-detection.gif" alt="Deepfake Detection" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Deepfake Detection</b><span>Is this real?</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/37-adversarial-ml-defense.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/37-adversarial-ml-defense.gif" alt="Adversarial ML Defense" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Adversarial ML Defense</b><span>Attacks on the model itself.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/38-ai-email-security.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/38-ai-email-security.gif" alt="AI Email Security" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Email Security</b><span>Stopping phishing with AI.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/39-ai-spm.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/39-ai-spm.gif" alt="AI Security Posture (AI-SPM)" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Security Posture (AI-SPM)</b><span>Secure your whole AI estate.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/40-lakehouse-architecture.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/40-lakehouse-architecture.gif" alt="Lakehouse Architecture" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Lakehouse Architecture</b><span>Warehouse + lake, unified.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/41-graphrag-knowledge-graph.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/41-graphrag-knowledge-graph.gif" alt="Knowledge Graph / GraphRAG" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Knowledge Graph / GraphRAG</b><span>Retrieval that understands relationships.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/42-experimentation-ab-testing.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/42-experimentation-ab-testing.gif" alt="Experimentation / A-B Testing" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Experimentation / A-B Testing</b><span>Did the change actually help?</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/43-how-agent-thinks-react.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/43-how-agent-thinks-react.gif" alt="How an AI Agent Thinks" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>How an AI Agent Thinks</b><span>Reason, act, observe, repeat.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/44-how-rlhf-aligns.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/44-how-rlhf-aligns.gif" alt="How RLHF Aligns a Model" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>How RLHF Aligns a Model</b><span>Teaching a model what we prefer.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/45-how-tokenization-works.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/45-how-tokenization-works.gif" alt="How Tokenization Works" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>How Tokenization Works</b><span>Text becomes numbers.</span></div>
  </a>

</div>

<div class="acsd-lb" id="acsdLightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Diagram viewer">
  <button class="acsd-lb-close" id="acsdLbClose" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
  <img id="acsdLbImg" src="" alt="">
  <div class="acsd-lb-cap" id="acsdLbCap"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var lb    = document.getElementById('acsdLightbox');
  var lbImg = document.getElementById('acsdLbImg');
  var lbCap = document.getElementById('acsdLbCap');
  var btn   = document.getElementById('acsdLbClose');
  if (!lb) return;

  function open(src, caption, alt) {
    lbImg.src = src;
    lbImg.alt = alt || '';
    lbCap.textContent = caption || '';
    lb.classList.add('open');
    document.body.classList.add('acsd-lb-on');
  }
  function close() {
    lb.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.classList.remove('acsd-lb-on');
    lbImg.src = '';
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.acsd-tile').forEach(function (tile) {
    tile.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      var img = tile.querySelector('img');
      var capEl = tile.querySelector('.acsd-cap b');
      open(tile.getAttribute('href'), capEl ? capEl.textContent : '', img ? img.alt : '');
    });
  });

  btn.addEventListener('click', close);
  lb.addEventListener('click', function (e) { if (e.target === lb) close(); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && lb.classList.contains('open')) close();
  });
})();
</script>
```

::: {.acsd-intro}
*Follow along on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kader-m-1a6023a6/).*
:::
